header.title: Getting Started with Email Administration
header.description: Set up and manage email campaigns and request workflows.

sections.title: Email Administration Overview
sections.content: Manage email templates, campaign requests, and integration settings for reliable, branded correspondence.

sections.title: Configuration & Setup
sections.content: Configure email providers, templates, and delivery settings for optimal reliability.

sections.title: Infrastructure & Monitoring
sections.content: Monitor email delivery, manage service integrations (Resend, SendGrid), and track system health.

sections.title: Request Management
sections.content: Handle incoming email requests, track SLAs, and manage role-based access controls.
